scenarios.name: codex-trivial-hello
scenarios.prompt: Say hi in one short sentence.

scenarios.name: codex-trivial-math
scenarios.prompt: What is two plus two? Reply with one short sentence.

scenarios.name: codex-lookup-harness-path
scenarios.prompt: Reply with just the path to the RepoLine Python latency harness wrapper script.

scenarios.name: codex-lookup-cursor-var
scenarios.prompt: Reply with just the env var name that controls Cursor App versus Cursor CLI transport in RepoLine.

scenarios.name: codex-planning-summary
scenarios.prompt: What does RepoLine do in one short sentence?

scenarios.name: codex-planning-default
scenarios.prompt: What is the recommended first-run coding agent for RepoLine? Reply with one short sentence.
